positive: A majestic, minimalist depiction of a howling wolf head howling towards a full, radiant moon. The style is highly stylized geometric vector art combined with deep cosmic watercolor textures. The wolf should have sharp, clean outlines and an elegant silhouette. The background features swirling nebulous colors of deep indigo, sapphire blue, and ethereal violet, punctuated by stylized constellations and scattered geometric moons. The composition is centralized, focusing on the upward curve of the wolf's neck and snout. Lighting is dramatic and high-contrast, utilizing strong blacks and glowing cyan/silver accents. Perfect for screen printing or DTG apparel transfer. Isolated elements, clean edges, maximum visual impact, 4k, high contrast, tattoo art style.
